hero.subtitle: I build end-to-end applications with a focus on user experience, clean code, well-structured APIs, and systems designed to grow.

about.name: João Santos
about.paragraph1: I’m a full-stack developer currently completing my degree in Systems Analysis and Development, with experience across the entire software development lifecycle. My work spans from requirements gathering and understanding the problem to system modeling, logic creation, interface design, development, testing, deployment, and user training support.
about.paragraph2: My focus is on building complete, scalable, and secure applications, always seeking to align technical quality with a modern and intuitive experience.
about.stackDescription: Technologies and tools I have worked with throughout my projects.
about.achievementsDescription: Certifications and achievements that are part of my journey.
about.carouselDotsAriaLabel: Navigation between about me section panels
about.stackFeaturedTooltip: Frequently used technology in my projects
about.stackFeaturedAriaLabel: {{stack}} is a frequently used technology in my projects

kodaAi.title: Koda AI
kodaAi.role: Full-stack development of a corporate AI platform
kodaAi.description: An artificial intelligence chat platform built for corporate use, integrating with the Gemini API, Auth0 authentication, MySQL database, and features for text generation, image generation, and internal automation. The platform also includes specialized scripts designed for different team needs and administrative dashboards to monitor employee usage.
highlights: Integration with generative AI models and image generation through API.
User management and centralized authentication with Auth0.
Internal scripts created for specific needs across different teams.
Administrative dashboards for usage analysis and platform monitoring.

clientPortal.title: Client Portal
clientPortal.role: Full-stack development and architecture of a corporate client platform
clientPortal.description: A corporate portal created to centralize the relationship between company and clients, bringing together projects, products, attachments, responsible users, permissions, dashboards, and ERP integrations in a single platform. The application uses React, FastAPI, MySQL, Auth0, and a Docker-based container architecture hosted on DigitalOcean.
highlights: Complete hub for centralizing projects, products, and strategic information for clients.
ERP integration and project organization by clients, teams, and categories.
Access control with multiple roles, such as administrator, manager, leader, editor, and client.
Architecture separated into containers for front-end, back-end, database, and microservices.

vilmora.title: Vilmora
vilmora.role: Full-stack development of an authorial calendar integration product
vilmora.description: A web platform in development to centralize and synchronize calendars from different accounts and digital platforms. Its purpose is to reduce scheduling conflicts, rework, and manual checking by providing a unified view of appointments and automatic blocking between connected accounts.
highlights: Centralization of calendars from different accounts into a single experience.
Synchronization and automatic blocking to reduce scheduling conflicts.
Architecture planned for integration with Google and Microsoft ecosystems.
Application designed for productivity, routine organization, and availability management.

pdfExtractor.title: PDF Extractor
pdfExtractor.role: Technical evolution and functional expansion of an existing tool
pdfExtractor.description: A corporate tool for extracting and processing information from PDFs, initially created with basic features and later evolved into a more complete solution. The project was developed with React TSX on the front-end and C# on the back-end, using local cache and integration with an established online catalog system.
highlights: Evolution from a simple initial version into a more complete tool aligned with real team usage.
PDF processing without the need for a database, using local cache.
Integration with an external online catalog system.
Structure prepared for future hosting on Azure servers.
